ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: SpinShot 360 uses the camera to record 360 videos, boomerangs, and cinematic videos for events created in the app, for example when capturing a video with a frame and music to share or save to the device.
ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SpinShot 360 uses the microphone to record audio for videos captured in the app, for example when creating a 360 video or boomerang with live event sound.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SpinShot 360 accesses the photo library so you can choose media from your device, for example when selecting an image or video to use in an event.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: SpinShot 360 saves videos and images created in the app to your photo library, for example when exporting a finished video to your device.
